[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111101 5
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 1000000 1
4 0000010 1
5 0101100 3
6 0010001 2
7 1011100 4

01 0111101 5 match 0

23 1000010 2
34 0110010 3

67 0111001 4
